name: grok-bitch
description: Offload mechanical, well-specified, verifiable grunt work to grok (grok-build) from Claude Code. grok runs caged: an OS sandbox, hard resource caps so it can't OOM the box, byte-snapshot guard+revert on protected paths, and a verify gate — and hands back a structured JSON verdict. Claude keeps the rigor; grok does the bitch work. Ships a skill (so Claude reaches for it automatically), a Rick subagent that bosses grok (Morty) around in an isolated context and returns a clean verdict, a Jerry subagent (fast cheap Claude Haiku for trivial scraps), and the grok-bitch CLI on PATH.
